expectations.text: Covers CRP, image, JS, font areas
expectations.evidence: Table explicitly covers CRP area (PERF-01 render-blocking script, PERF-02 LCP fetchpriority+preload, PERF-03 Critical CSS), image area (PERF-04 width/height, PERF-05 loading=lazy, PERF-06 WebP/AVIF), JS area (PERF-07 code splitting, PERF-08 tree shaking, PERF-09 layout thrashing), font area (PERF-10 font-display, PERF-11 font preload).
Lists all 11 items from PERF-01 through PERF-11 in a structured table with code, area, item name, result, and findings columns.
Each PERF item has individual result (all marked N/A with dash) and per-item explanation of why no issue was found (e.g., 'no HTML/JSX script loading code in changed files').

eval_feedback.overall: With-skill run produced a well-structured output that follows the PERF-01 to PERF-11 checklist format, covering all four required areas (CRP, image, JS, font). Correctly identified that no web source files were changed and marked all items as N/A with appropriate reasoning.
